info.value:
M: Hi, Linda. You look so happy today.

W: Yes, Tom. I've just heard that I won first prize in the English speech competition.

M: Congratulations! How did you prepare for it?

W: I practised every day and my teacher gave me a lot of help.

M: That's great! What will you do with the prize money?

W: I'm going to buy some books and a new dictionary.
